_comment: Datamined cross-check seed. Key = spellID. This is ground truth the collector checks submissions against BEFORE a spell can auto-verify. Build it from wago.tools / wow.tools spell + creature data for the 2.5.x client, or grow it by hand-approving 'pending' candidates. Upload to the SEED KV namespace under key 'seed'. With NO seed, every submission stays 'pending' and only your manual review promotes anything — safe by default.
_fields: name (required), npcs (optional creatureIDs known to cast it), zones (optional), interruptible (set false to hard-reject a known padlock)
